## Analyzers (1)

Enrich observables with intelligence

### [IBMXForce Lookup v1.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/IBMXForce)
Query domains, IPs, hashes and URLs against IBM X-Force threat intelligence sharing platform.

- **Author:** Davide Arcuri and Andrea Garavaglia, LDO-CERT
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `domain`, `ip`, `hash`, `url`
